buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.24.0 --activate && cd apps/web && corepack pnpm --version && corepack pnpm run build
installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.24.0 --activate && cd apps/web && corepack pnpm --version && corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
